title: cystopteris perriniana
intro: Cystopteris perriniana, also known as the brittle bladderfern, is a type of fern that belongs to the Cystopteridaceae family and is native to eastern North America. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Cystopteris perriniana include its ability to treat various ailments such as sore throats, coughs, and skin irritations, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and cholesterol levels. Cystopteris perriniana is often used in herbal preparations, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, although more research is needed to fully understand its effects on human health.
